task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Todo CRUD API** (Level 4)

Build a full CRUD API for a Todos table with fields: title (required, text), done (boolean, defaults to false). POST /api/todos creates, GET /api/todos lists all, GET /api/todos/:id gets one, PUT /api/todos/:id updates, DELETE /api/todos/:id removes.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Todos table:
  title, required
  done

# Your endpoints here

```

The app must pass these HTTP tests:
  - POST /api/todos wit
final_source:
build for javascript backend
allow signup and login

create a Todos table:
  title, required
  done, default false

when user calls POST /api/todos sending todo:
  requires login
  validate todo:
    title must not be empty
  saved = save todo to Todos
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls GET /api/todos:
  todos = get all Todos
  send back todos

when user calls GET /api/todos/:id:
  todo = look up Todo with this id
  send back todo

when user calls PUT /api/todos/:id sending changes:
  requires login
  save changes to Todos with this id
  send back the Todo with this id

when user calls DELETE /api/todos/:id:
  requires login
  delete Todo with this id
  send back 'ok'

test 'POST /api/todos with valid todo':
  post to '/api/todos' with {'title': 'Buy groceries'}
  expect response status is 201
  expect response has 'id' and 'title'

test 'GET /api/todos returns list':
  get from '/api/todos'
  expect response status is 200
  expect response length is greater than 0

test 'POST /api/todos with empty title':
  post to '/api/todos' with {}
  expect response status is 400

test 'POST /api/todos with title':
  post to '/api/todos' with {'title': 'Walk the dog'}
  expect response status is 201
  expect response has 'id'
